digest.greeting: Jean, today moved the BD/Court follow-up into clearer action, with Nicolas Loop tasks now created from the late-day portfolio work. The remaining open items are mostly owner-setting threads: BD follow-ups, Incident Response, BA workflow, Levelpath, PM operating structure, and tomorrow's portfolio stack.

items.label: Turned the BD/Court intake follow-up into Nicolas Loop tasks
items.detail: The dashboard marks the Loop BD/Court intake follow-up complete, and Outlook shows Jean assigned Nicolas follow-up tasks for the Docusign project, project closure, and Nicolas's automation list.

items.label: Created the CSC portfolio review invite
items.detail: Outlook shows Jean sent the CSC Portfolio initial review invite to Hassan today.

items.label: Push Incident Response incident guides to completion
items.detail: Follow up with the stakeholders and get the incident guides to a clear owner, deadline, or finished state.

items.label: Finish the Jessie and Nicolas BD project follow-up loop
items.detail: Outlook shows a BD touchpoint with Jessie happened today and Nicolas received new Loop tasks. Close the remaining BD project follow-up so the work is not split between meeting notes, Loop, and the dashboard.

items.label: Convert remaining BD Portfolio Review follow-ups into owners
items.detail: Carry forward only the BD review decisions, blockers, or intake choices that still need a named owner after today's follow-up activity.

items.label: Close the Maria 1:1 roadblock follow-ups
items.detail: Confirm which portfolio roadblocks from Monday's Maria 1:1 still need action, and keep only the items that need a named owner or date.

items.label: Review Janet's BA request workflow notes
items.detail: Keep the revised tiered intake flow, BA availability review with Anu, UAT notification gaps, and the biweekly EPMO/IT working session visible until the next step is clear.

items.label: Close the Levelpath adoption-assessment answer
items.detail: Laura's consultation asked whether there is an adoption assessment before software go-live. Capture the answer or the owner for that assessment path.

items.label: Turn the PM team index, Planner, and weekly deck work into one usable operating structure
items.detail: Use the PM Team Touchpoint outcomes to keep the Loop index, Planner updates, and weekly deck aligned instead of maintaining them as separate threads.

items.label: Reschedule Paige for the Marketing portfolio review
items.detail: Paige declined the Marketing Initial Project Portfolio Review because of a conflict. Send a new time if Marketing portfolio ownership still needs coverage.

items.label: Capture any Jhara 1:1 roadblocks that still need owners
items.detail: The Jhara 1:1 agenda was portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps. Keep only the roadblocks that still need a named owner or date after today's conversation.

items.label: Litify development for Court was cancelled
items.detail: The morning Outlook-backed brief noted Jorge's cancellation and the direction that Litify 4.0 will cover the system improvements after alignment with operations leadership.

items.label: Bonus Restructure Project - Jean's Support
items.detail: Thiago scheduled a short support block with Jean.

items.label: 1:1 Thiago & Jean
items.detail: Protect the needed prep before this overlaps the morning focus block.

items.label: Jean/Sara 1:1
items.detail: The renewed weekly 1:1 series starts tomorrow.

items.label: Quality Planning Process
items.detail: Licelot's meeting will cover when Quality needs to be engaged in new products or processes.

items.label: Colombia Team Member Leave of Absence Information Session
items.detail: HR's Rippling-led LOA information session is scheduled for the Colombia EOR team.

items.label: Legal Initial Project Portfolio Review
items.detail: Portfolio review with Chelsea lands during the late-afternoon stack, with Colombia LOA and CoE touchpoint nearby.

items.label: CoE Biweekly Touchpoint
items.detail: Use this as the regular CoE progress and direction check-in with David, Frank, and Mar.
